product_overview: A web-based clinic admin surface to verify authentication, role-based route guards, navigation visibility, and permission-driven UI controls across clinic pages.
core_goals: Allow authenticated users to sign in and restore sessions so they can access their permitted clinic surfaces.
Enable users to view the clinic dashboard, calendar, customers, services, payments, employees, reports, and settings according to their role.
Show or hide navigation items and mutation controls based on role/permission so users only see actions they are allowed to perform.
Provide an admin permission board to view permission groups and employee permission assignments without performing destructive changes during live tests.

features.name: Authentication and session routing
features.description: Sign in, session restore, protected route redirect behavior, and logout so users gain access to permitted pages and are redirected when unauthenticated.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit login -> Confirm protected layout appears at /
Navigate to /customers while unauthenticated -> See redirect to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit login -> See /customers load
Navigate to /login -> Enter incorrect credentials -> Submit login -> See authentication error message
Log in -> Confirm protected layout appears -> Log out -> Confirm redirected to /login

features.name: Permission route guards and navigation visibility
features.description: Route-level permission checks drive whether pages render and which navigation items are visible for a user role.
user_flows: Log in as admin -> Navigate to / -> See admin navigation items and protected pages visible -> Navigate to /reports/dashboard -> See reports dashboard

Log in as limited user -> Navigate to / -> See only allowed navigation items visible and admin items hidden -> Attempt to navigate to /settings -> See access denied state or navigation prevents access
Log in as admin -> Navigate to /calendar -> Confirm calendar page loads -> Navigate to /service-catalog -> Confirm service catalog page loads

features.name: Customer permission actions
features.description: Customer list and profile views show or hide create/edit/delete and payment/service mutation controls according to the viewer's permissions.
user_flows: Log in as limited user -> Navigate to /customers -> Search customer list -> Open a customer profile -> Confirm create/edit/delete/service/deposit/payment controls are hidden
Log in as admin -> Navigate to /customers -> Search customer list -> Open a customer profile -> Confirm create/edit/delete/service/deposit/payment controls are visible -> Stop before any final submit

features.name: Admin permission board
features.description: Admins view permission groups and employee permission assignments; limited users cannot access this board.
user_flows: Log in as admin -> Navigate to /permissions -> Confirm groups and employees load -> Open a group card -> Open an employee card -> Stop before saving any changes
Log in as limited user -> Navigate to /permissions -> See access denied state or navigation prevents access

routes.description: Customer profile with view and mutation controls.
Operational services surface; route guard currently uses customers.edit.
Payments and monthly plans guarded by payment.view.
Feedback admin surface guarded by permissions.view.

features.name: Authentication and session routing
features.description: Login, session restore, protected route redirect, and logout.
user_interactions: Attempt protected deep links while unauthenticated

features.name: Permission route guards and navigation visibility
features.description: ProtectedRoute and Layout use route permission constants to allow, deny, show, or hide pages and navigation items.
user_interactions: Open protected routes as limited user
Compare visible sidebar items by role
Deep-link into restricted pages and confirm access denied behavior
Open permission debugger with Control Shift P when available

features.name: Customer permission actions
features.description: Customer list/profile allow view-only access for customers.view and hide create, edit, delete, hard-delete, service, deposit, and payment mutation controls without matching permissions.
user_interactions: Inspect add, edit, delete, service, deposit, and payment controls by role
Stop before any final submit that mutates production data

features.name: Admin permission board
features.description: Admins view and edit permission groups and employee permission assignments. Live test should verify view access only unless mutation is approved.
user_interactions: Verify limited user cannot open permission board
Do not save group or employee permission changes on production

known_limitations.issue: Live production tests must avoid final submit on create/edit/delete/payment/refund/password/permission/settings flows unless explicitly authorized.
known_limitations.impact: Read-only permission checks are safe, but generated autonomous tests may otherwise mutate real clinic data.

known_limitations.issue: Route guard for /services uses customers.edit while service catalog uses services.view.
known_limitations.impact: Limited roles may see unexpected allow or deny behavior around service routes.

known_limitations.issue: Frontend and backend permission resolution can diverge if partners.tier_id and employee_permissions.group_id drift.
known_limitations.impact: Login payload may imply access while backend guarded routes return 403, or the reverse.
